text:

Author: sbruno

Log:
  Bump to 2.5.50.g20160103, catchup with latest bug fixes.

  Fix dereference of wrong pointer arg in ipc/semctl syscall.
  Fix return from mmap() to setEINVAL and MAP_FAILED when len is 0
